title: CI Matrices, Required Checks, Caching, and Merge Policy · Repository Factory
summary: Build a secure required-check workflow across supported environments. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a required CI quality-gate workflow while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate trusted branch workflows from untrusted pull-request code and secrets.
Order cheap discriminating checks before expensive matrices while preserving useful parallelism.
Test declared runtime, operating-system, database, and feature support intentionally.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.

steps.title: Extend the cumulative artifact

steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Required Status into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
gates-required-status-191p1d:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
